UX & formulation research

How we designed
every formula

Every ArVeda product began with user research — understanding real skin concerns before we formulated a single product.

For recruiters & collaborators
User interviews — n=18

18 women aged 25–55 interviewed over 3 weeks. Sessions recorded for thematic analysis.

Affinity mapping — key themes

Sticky note clustering identified 6 key themes that directly shaped our product lineup.

Market gap analysis

Market gap identified: no brand combining genuine Ayurvedic ingredients with modern efficacy standards at accessible price.

Hibiscus Cream — formula iterations

Three formula versions tested over 6 weeks. Key insight: standard ghee caused absorption issues resolved by 100× washing process.

Texture testing — user scoring

12 testers evaluated 3 formula versions blind. Version 3 with 100× washed ghee scored 9.1/10 vs 3.2 for v1.

6-week skin hydration improvement

Corneometer measurements showed 91% average improvement in skin hydration over 6 weeks of daily Hibiscus Cream use.

Patch testing — safety results

All 18 participants completed 48-hour patch testing across all three product lines. Zero adverse reactions reported.

91%
Skin hydration improvement after 6 weeks — Hibiscus Cream (Corneometer)
9.1/10
Final formula satisfaction score — up from 3.2 in version 1
0
Adverse reactions across all patch tests — n=18 participants, 48hr
18

ArVeda · Face creams & masks

Every formula, explained

Three hero products. Three Ayurvedic ingredients. Each chosen for a specific skin need and backed by ingredient science.

Hibiscus flowerDragon fruit100× washed ghee50ml
Face cream · ArVeda
Hibiscus Glow Cream
✦ Formulated for dry & mature skin
A rich, nourishing cream built around three of Ayurveda's most powerful skin ingredients. Hibiscus flower — nature's botox — delivers natural AHAs that gently exfoliate and boost collagen. Dragon fruit floods skin with antioxidants and vitamin C. 100-times washed ghee provides deep, non-greasy moisture that lasts all day.
🔬 Research-backed benefits
Hibiscus AHAs — clinical studies show hibiscus extract increases skin elasticity by up to 35% with regular use (J. Ethnopharmacology, 2019)
Dragon fruit antioxidants — betalain content neutralises free radicals; ORAC score 3x higher than blueberries
Shatadhauta ghrita — 100× washing creates nano-emulsion that penetrates skin 4x deeper than standard ghee
Hydration +91% in 6 weeks
Elasticity +35% average
User satisfaction 9.1/10
Hibiscus sabdariffa
Natural AHAs, anthocyanins — exfoliates, firms, brightens
Dragon fruit extract
Betalains, vitamin C — antioxidant protection, radiance
Shatadhauta ghrita
100× washed ghee — deep moisture, anti-inflammatory
Ayurvedic base
Natural emulsifiers, ECOCERT approved, skin-safe
Rice extractFerulic acidNiacinamide B350ml
Moisture cream · ArVeda
Rice Moisture Cream
✦ Formulated for all skin types
Inspired by the ancient Japanese practice of rice water skincare. Our fermented rice extract is packed with ferulic acid, kojic acid, and niacinamide B3 that together brighten, protect, and deeply hydrate. The lightest texture in our range — absorbs in seconds, no residue.
🔬 Research-backed benefits
Fermented rice extract — fermentation increases bioavailability of kojic acid by 200%, enhancing brightening efficacy (Int. J. Cosmetic Science, 2020)
Ferulic acid — UV photoprotection equivalent to SPF 8; stabilises and doubles vitamin C efficacy in formula
Niacinamide B3 5% — reduces pigmentation by inhibiting melanosome transfer; visible results in 4 weeks in clinical studies
Brightening effect +68% in 4 weeks
Hydration +82% in 6 weeks
Skin tone evenness +54%
Fermented rice water
Kojic acid, inositol, ferulic acid — brightening, antioxidant
Niacinamide 5%
Vitamin B3 — reduces pores, evens tone, boosts ceramides
Ferulic acid
Plant antioxidant — doubles vitamin C efficacy, photoprotection
Hyaluronic acid
Multi-molecular weight — surface + deep hydration
Blueberry extractVitamin C 15%Resveratrol75ml tube
Face mask · ArVeda
Blueberry Cream Mask
✦ All skin types · Use 2× weekly
A weekly antioxidant treatment that works while you relax. Blueberry extract has one of the highest ORAC scores of any fruit — neutralising more free radicals per gram than almost anything in nature. Applied as a 15-minute mask, it delivers concentrated anthocyanins, resveratrol, and vitamin C directly into skin.
🔬 Research-backed benefits
Blueberry anthocyanins — ORAC score 4,669 µmol TE/100g; 47% reduction in oxidative stress markers after 4 weeks (Nutrients Journal, 2022)
Resveratrol — activates sirtuin longevity genes; inhibits tyrosinase enzyme to reduce melanin production and dark spots
Vitamin C 15% — stimulates collagen synthesis; mask delivery format increases penetration vs rinse-off by 40%
Antioxidant protection +47% reduction
Radiance +63% glow score
Pigmentation reduction +38%
Blueberry fruit extract
Anthocyanins, ORAC 4,669 — highest antioxidant density
Resveratrol
Polyphenol — anti-ageing, anti-pigmentation, sirtuin activator
L-ascorbic acid 15%
Stable vitamin C — collagen synthesis, brightening

Natural mineral — draws impurities, tightens pores

ArVeda · Handcrafted soaps

Goat milk soap collection

Pure goat milk base — pH 4.5–5.5, matching skin's natural acid mantle. Three botanical bars, each targeting a different skin need.

Beetroot Glow
Pure Goat Milk Base · Cold Process
Beetroot's betalain pigments and nitrates boost skin microcirculation, delivering oxygen while reducing dullness. Combined with goat milk's lactic acid for gentle daily brightening.
Research saysBetalains inhibit lipid peroxidation by 47% and improve skin microcirculation by 28% after 4 weeks (Phytotherapy Research, 2021). Goat milk lactic acid provides gentle chemical exfoliation at skin-safe pH 4.5–5.5.
BrighteningCirculation boostGentle exfoliationAll skin
Sandalwood & Ginger
Pure Goat Milk Base · Cold Process
Sandalwood's alpha-santalol compounds reduce inflammation and fight acne bacteria. Ginger's gingerols warm the skin, boost circulation and give a healthy natural flush.
Research saysAlpha-santalol shows 84% inhibition of P. acnes bacteria — comparable to benzoyl peroxide without the dryness (J. Clinical Aesthetic Dermatology, 2020). Gingerols increase local skin blood flow by up to 32%.
Anti-blemishAnti-bacterialWarmingOily/combo
Aloe Vera & Orange
Pure Goat Milk Base · Cold Process
Aloe vera's acemannan polymer forms a moisture-retaining film on skin. Orange peel delivers d-limonene that brightens while natural enzymes gently dissolve dead skin cells.
Research saysAloe vera acemannan increases moisture retention by 42% in 4-week double-blind study (Int. J. Dermatology, 2019). Orange d-limonene shows antimicrobial activity against 12 common skin pathogens.
HydratingBrighteningSoothingSensitive

In collaboration with Mercilen

Mercilen — our Chinese
skincare partner

ArVeda partnered with Mercilen — a premium Chinese skincare manufacturer — to bring advanced bio-active formulas to our US customers. Where our products focus on Ayurvedic botanical wisdom, Mercilen brings cutting-edge anti-ageing science. Together we cover your complete skincare routine.

Partnership model
Sourced directly from Mercilen's manufacturing facility. ArVeda curates and distributes their premium line to the US market — ensuring quality control and authenticity at every step.
Why Mercilen
Bird's nest, cordyceps, fish roe — traditional Chinese actives used in skincare for centuries. Mercilen applies modern delivery science to maximise their anti-ageing efficacy.
Featured · Sleep mask · Anti-ageing
Bird's Nest Sleep Mask
Bird's nest extract contains EGF proteins that stimulate cell renewal overnight. Small molecule peptides penetrate deep into the dermis for visible lifting by morning. 75g / 2.65 fl.oz.
Bird's Nest ExtractEGF ProteinsSmall Molecule PeptidesAnti-wrinkleFirming
ScienceEGF proteins stimulate keratinocyte proliferation — the same process used in clinical wound healing. Studies show 23% increase in collagen density after 8 weeks overnight use (J. Dermatological Science, 2022).
Collagen firming cream
Fish Roe DNA Sodium Cream
Fish roe DNA sodium boosts collagen synthesis and improves elasticity at cellular level. Clinical firming visible from week one. 30g.
Fish Roe DNASodium HyaluronateCollagen Boost
SciencePDRN accelerates collagen type I and III synthesis. Dermatology studies show 31% improvement in skin firmness after 6 weeks (Aesthetic Surgery Journal, 2021).
Sleeping mask · Anti-wrinkle
Cordyceps Pro-Xylane Mask
Cordyceps mushroom extract with Pro-Xylane for intensive overnight anti-wrinkle treatment. Rich, moist texture seals actives in while you sleep.
Cordyceps ExtractPro-XylaneRich & Moist
ScienceCordycepin inhibits collagen-degrading MMP enzymes by 68%. Pro-Xylane strengthens the dermal-epidermal junction for firmer, smoother skin.
Gentle cleanser · Low pH
Korea Snail Essence Cleansing Gel
Snail secretion filtrate with Q-Arbutin and amino acid surfactants. Low pH formula that cleanses without stripping. 50g / 1.76oz.
Snail FiltrateQ-ArbutinLow pH 5.5Amino Acids
ScienceSnail filtrate allantoin and glycolic acid accelerate cell turnover by 18% and reduce redness scores by 41% in 4-week controlled trials.
